# render-contributions

Contributes a `Contributions.FacetTable` tab to the Studio Contributions view showing all forward
cross-plugin import edges (`apiUses`) aggregated across plugins, one row per
(used symbol/plugin, runtime, plugin). The `importedBy` reverse index is derived
from these edges, so the table shows the forward direction only.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin cross-refs table in the Studio Contributions view.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Contributions.FacetTable` "Cross-refs"
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/contributions-table.Contributions`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.defineFacetTable`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.FacetTableEntry`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.PluginChip`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
